action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Udell, Anderson, Andraca, Arney, Brown, Clancy, Cruz, DeSmidt, Emerson, Joers, Johnson, Madison, Moore Omokunde, Ortiz-Velez, Phelps, Roe, Sinicki, Stroud, Stubbs, Subeck and Tenorio; 
cosponsored by Senators Ratcliff, Carpenter, Hesselbein, L. Johnson, Larson, Spreitzer and Wall
